name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with physical locations nationwide and online lending options.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating multiple store locations across the United States, providing rapid access to emergency cash and related financial products. The company serves customers who need immediate funds and lack access to traditional banking solutions.

ACE's service portfolio includes installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, and tax services. They advertise same-day or next-day funding for online loans and maintain a physical store network for in-person transactions. The company also offers business services and a rewards program (referenced by their Target gift card promotion).

ACE distinguishes itself through multi-channel availability—customers can access services both online and at physical locations. They provide multiple financial solutions beyond payday lending, including title-based collateral loans and tax preparation services, creating a broader financial services ecosystem. The company operates in regulated markets and maintains compliance documentation for residents in specific states like California.

ACE Cash Express operates in the high-cost lending space typical of emergency cash providers. While offering convenience and speed, customers should be aware that these products typically carry high interest rates and fees associated with short-term, unsecured lending. The website errors encountered suggest potential operational or maintenance issues, though this may be temporary. Prospective borrowers should carefully review all loan terms and ensure they understand repayment obligations before proceeding.
pros: Multiple service offerings beyond loans—check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services in one location
Online lending option available for customers who prefer digital application and funding
Physical store locations nationwide for in-person service and immediate access to funds
Title loan option allowing customers to use vehicle equity for larger emergency loans
Same-day or next-day funding advertised for online loans
Installment loan products available as alternative to payday loans
Dedicated customer service phone lines for general inquiries and online loan support
cons: Website appears to have technical issues with multiple 404 errors on location and service pages
Not all loan products available in all states—Colorado location shows 'This type of loan is not available in this state' messages
High-cost lending products typical of emergency cash providers, likely carrying substantial interest rates and fees
Limited transparency on interest rates, APRs, and fee structures visible from provided website content
Temporary store closures occurred (New Orleans due to Hurricane Ida reference suggests older content or ongoing issues)
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash for emergency expenses who have a vehicle for title loan collateral
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking check cashing and bill payment services
Small business owners needing business financial services alongside personal cash needs
Customers in states where multiple loan types are available and want consolidated financial access
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in emergency situations who need fast access to cash and have either a vehicle to leverage for title loans or prefer traditional storefront lending over online-only options. The primary caveat is that these are high-cost emergency products; borrowers should fully understand interest rates, fees, and repayment terms before committing, and should explore whether state-specific payday alternatives or credit union PALs might offer better terms.
services: Cards (product type referenced but not detailed)
Store locator and physical location services
Customer service support via phone and email

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
